item.title: 8.5 K BCE
item.description: 8.5 K BCE Sphinx & Egyptian Pyramids Session Date: Oct 05, 1994 Q: (L) Who built the great pyramid? A: Atlanteans. Q: (L) What year was it built? A: 10643 years ago.
